test.name: Research-log entry written at URL-generation time, not deferred
test.description: The skill's headline invariant: every URL-generation turn ends with a log entry already written (outcome partial, capture_received false) — deferring the log until a capture arrives loses the audit trail when the capture never comes. This test exists purely to pin that timing; the URL itself is a routine Ancestry census search.

input.user_message: Search Ancestry for Patrick Flynn in the 1880 census.

judge_context: The same turn that presents the Ancestry URL must also append the research-log entry — outcome partial, capture_received false, results_examined 0, with the generated URL recorded in external_site.url_generated
The response is incomplete if it presents the URL and says it will log after the user returns results — logging is part of the URL-generation step, not the capture step
Log query should capture the search parameters used (name Patrick Flynn, 1880 census, Pennsylvania/Schuylkill)
